title: wedelia squarrosa
intro: Wedelia squarrosa, also known as Sow Thistle or Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Brazil and other parts of South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain and fever. Herbal preparations of Wedelia squarrosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
